metaRootCause: Data propagation/sync delays - updates in one system not reflecting in another in a timely manner

tickets.summary: Incorrect VR showing up on PFS
tickets.description: Provider profile showing 'Allergy Shots' under popular VRs but this VR is not mapped to their profile.

tickets.summary: The provider updated her VRs and they are not updating on pt side
tickets.description: Provider updated VRs to be limited, but patient search still shows her available for all visit reasons after 1+ hour.
Provider FAQ still showing VRs that were removed. VR removal not reflected in FAQ section.
POC unable to see updated headshot for provider. Image updated in system but not displaying.
Provider has CI complete but Marketplace SKU not activated. Availability flashing on PFP.

tickets.summary: DSP status showing inactive for active MD Mardiney opp
tickets.description: Pulse shows professional as Active but Salesforce DSP shows Inactive.
Three-day delay in Salesforce case creation for 3 providers.

tickets.summary: DEC invoice not able to load and DEC Appointment Report not loading
tickets.description: December invoice grayed out/unloadable, DEC Appointment Report not loading since Dec 26th.

clusters.name: VR Propagation
clusters.rootCause: VR updates not propagating to patient-facing pages, search, or FAQ sections in a timely manner
symptoms: VR changes not reflecting on patient search
Removed VRs still showing in FAQ

clusters.name: Salesforce Sync
clusters.rootCause: Status/case sync between Pulse and Salesforce failing or delayed
symptoms: DSP status mismatch between Pulse and SF

clusters.name: Availability Propagation
clusters.rootCause: Marketplace availability activation not syncing properly

clusters.name: Profile Media Updates
clusters.rootCause: Profile media (headshots) not updating due to caching

clusters.name: Billing/Reports Loading
clusters.rootCause: Invoice and appointment report generation/loading failures
